title: Scope RBAC to least privilege per ServiceAccount
description: Grant Roles namespace-scoped with explicit verbs and resources; reserve ClusterRoles and wildcards for genuine cluster-wide need.
body: Use when a workload or user needs API access, or when reviewing a RoleBinding. Do not grant ClusterRole cluster-admin, wildcard verbs (verbs: ['*']), or wildcard resources to make something work. Actions: create a dedicated ServiceAccount; bind a namespaced Role listing exact apiGroups/resources/verbs; prefer Role over ClusterRole; audit existing bindings with kubectl auth can-i --list. Validation signals include kubectl auth can-i returning 'no' for actions the workload should not perform and the RoleBinding subject being the dedicated SA. Risk boundary: any widening of a Role/ClusterRole or new cluster-scoped grant is a privilege change requiring human review.
